daily.today_energy: You're radiating main character energy today, Aries. The cosmos is vibing with your boldness—lean into those ideas that feel a little risky. Trust the butterflies.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing your glow. Whether you're coupled up or single, today's about authenticity over performance. Real connection happens when you drop the act.
daily.career: Your initiative is contagious right now. Speak up in that meeting or pitch that thing you've been sitting on. The universe has your back—your confidence is perfectly timed.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move in ways that feel good, not guilt-driven. Dance, stretch, walk—whatever makes you feel alive. Nourish yourself like you actually matter (because you do).

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your zone of self-expression this week, Aries. It's giving main character energy—the kind where your words hit different and people actually listen. Trust your instincts, they're eerily accurate rn.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a vibe shift incoming. If you're taken, deep convos are flowing naturally—don't shy away from vulnerability. Single? Someone's about to slide into your orbit who gets your whole chaotic energy.
weekly.career: Your confidence is absolutely unhinged in the best way possible. This is your moment to pitch that idea, ask for what you deserve, or pivot toward something that actually aligns with your values. The universe is literally cheering you on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels like play, not punishment. Whether it's dancing, hiking, or just stretching without forcing it, honor what brings you alive. Recovery is just as powerful as hustle this week.
